transcript.text:
[Gyeongbuk, Uljin-gun, Jookbyun Pier]
The quality is the best out of all the shrimps
[Fresh]
[Dokdo Prawn Mukbang]
[Starting now]
This is why crabs are going extinct
Did you apologize to them yet?
Host a funeral for them
[Seafood party]
[Suffering from eating too much]
I told you to stop eating
I didn't want to lose to you
You would've lost even if I had a meal before this
Hello everyone~
I am here at Uljin today
I heard that there are a lot of Dokdo prawns coming this way

So I'm waiting for the fishing boat
It'll be boring for me to do it alone So I brought some special guests
Hello~
Hurry~
Hello
Nice to see you all
Beauty comedian Park So Young
Beauty comedian Oh Na Mi
I'm Kwon Jae Kwan
I had it in Seoul, but not here
They will get stressed out during their ride to Seoul
When the boat comes here,
We're going to steal it
Here it comes
The boat is coming sideways
No it's not

[Looking suspicious]
[Arrived]
[Let's go!]
She won't be much of a help
[No refunds]
[Guided by the captain]
[We are here to pick up Dokdo prawns]
This is a pandalus
This is the Kuruma prawn
This one is really tasty
They are in season right now
Really
Rooster comb
This Spiny Lobster has the best quality meat
[Spiny Lobster, Pandalus, Kuruma]
It looks like a rooster's comb, right? It's really hard

You can put a hole in a beer can with this
You can stab a beer can with this? No way
I'll show you
Amazing
Wait, you did it because you wanted to drink beer, right?
This can feed an adult with a bottle of soju
This friend is very special
Really? This one's for you then
This isn't enough for her
No? haha
Just like this
Mine
It's moving
[Fresh prawn in 1 bite]
[No words needed]
Soyoung, drink some water

I was thirsty, thank you
[Soyoung tastes the prawn too] This one will get you a son
Do you have anything that can get me a husband?
Just make a lot of money
She makes a lot
Okay then catch lots of shrimp
[Bangpaji Seafood Restaurant #7]
Prawns, prawns... [Blanks out]
We brought the freshly caught prawns and came to the restaurant
[Freshly caught Dokdo prawns]
[Who's not scared of Tzuyang?]
[I got you!]
[And that's not all!]
[It's Yellowtail and sashimi]
[Side to side]
[Excited]

[Slave Jae Kwan back at it again]
Stay still Calm down
How are they so strong?
[The strongest one for Tzuyang]
[Executioner]
[Slave Jae Kwan is back to work]
[The 3 of them are scared]
Stay still! You guys are so loud
It went it Then take it out!
Marinated shrimp
[Here take 1]
[1 for you too]
[1 for Tzuyang too]
[And finally Jae Kwan too]
So good
[Pandalus]

[Why Tzuyang?]
So big
[Cracking it open with her face]
[Goodbye shell]
You need to taste the original taste without any sauce
[The original taste]
2 in 1 bite now
[1 is not enough]
[Satisfied]
That's so good
I had this before
That's why I insisted on coming here
It was so delicious
This is not a normal prawn
[A plate of yellowtail sashimi]
What do we dip this in?

You don't need the wet naps? Yeah, I'm going to wipe it on you
Yellowtail is so good too
Now the yellowtail is under her radar
[Sharing is caring]
It's so tasty
Try this It's so savory
Say "ah~"
Airplane~~
[Don't worry, they're close friends]
It still has the shell on it
What did you say?
I didn't even notice the abalone there
Where is it?
Oh here you are
Go away
[Sashimi in cold spicy soup with vegetables]

[Palate cleanser]
That's so good
The cold soup is amazing
It's just yummy
[Slave Jae Kwan too]
That's so tasty
Bring that to me
You are next!
If you move, you're dead
[Let's play a game]
You moved, so you're next
[Jumps in the soy sauce]
You too!
You want to go next? Okay
That's so big
Try it

I'll get the shell off
[Let me try it]
Who here has the smallest face?
[Compare it with Tzuyang's face]
It's as big as her face
There are horns on the head
Take it like this
[Tzuyang's way to eat the prawn head]
You eat the inside
[Just like that]
Delicious
Look at the intestines come out
[Slurp the intestines]
That's tasty
[Okay I got you]
Thank you

Eggs
I want to try this one right here
[Bye prawn]
I'm so happy to see my little sisters eat
Eat a lot
I'm good at peeling this now
[It never gets old]
What is this?
[Dried Saury]
I need to eat that
[Dip it in Chojang (Red chili paste with vinegar) and onto the dried seaweed]
Take the garlic
[Now that's a wrap]
[Trying out Tzuyang's wrap]
People said to eat Snow Crabs in Uljin
Is it good?

Yes, this city is known for snow crabs
I saw it earlier, it was tiny
Well, that's because you always eat King Crabs
Right, I had 5kg of King Crabs before
Yeah, that's why everything looks small
[They're not small]
Snow Crabs are here
So cute!
I'm good at this It's my time to shine
[Let me show you how it's done]
[Teaching them how to do it]
[This is how you eat snow crabs]
[Tzuyang's snow crabs]
[1 leg each]
That's sweet
Can I eat 5 at once?

[Trying it out]
[Cracking the body open]
[Filled with intestines]
The body meat tastes so much better
[Editor]
[Dessert time]
[Prawn head ramyun noodles]
[Chef Nami with the noodles]
That looks so good
[Snow Crab Ramyun bath]
[Complete]
That looks amazing
[Scoop the noodles with the soup]
[Jae Kwan takes the first bite]
Sis, that's really good
Thank you

[Editor: I must've been really hungry at the time]
Over here
Put the noodles in
[This is torture for us]
[Zoning out]
I'm so full
It's been so long since I ate this much
5 more snow crabs are coming out
I came today really prepared
I knew it wasn't going to be easy
This is all I've got
Over here
I'm going to put the intestines
[Ramyun noodle slurp]
[The pot is Tzuyang's dish]
What do you have against "food"?

[A cup of coca cola]
I'm so full
[Not me]
[More snow crabs]
[The kitchen removed the meat for them]
That's beautiful
Since everyone said they're full
[I'll take these]
All the legs from this plate
[Quantity: Can't count]
[Specialty: 1 bite]
How does that all fit in your small mouth?
You can stop eating, you will get sick
I'm going to beat you
[Mukbang round 2]
We've been here for 2 hours and 30 minutes

Really?
I've never eaten a meal for 2 hours and 30 minutes
It's because there was a lot of peeling and cracking
Seafood doesn't really fill you up
We are filled
Go to the hospital
Why is she not getting full?
[Snow Crab fried rice]
Behold!
We're only 4 people and there are 5 of them
I can eat it all
[Food tastes best when it's eaten together]
I'm getting food coma
So true
[Got sick of eating]
I'm going to fall asleep

She has more energy than before
[1 more]
[It's not filling me up]
I'm going to take a nap, everyone See you later
You okay?
Tzuyang just ate 4 bowls
This is why crabs will go extinct
Did you ever apologize to them?
Host a funeral for them
[RIP]
[Mukbang aftermath]
[Saying what they wish for 2020] What's yours?
In 2020,
I want to do more shows/programs
More than right now
Good health, more programs, and a boyfriend

We couldn't end it on a happy note?
Good health of course It's the best
Working hard just like this
Keep good relationships
For me
Say that you will eat more
That you will eat iron and paper cups Even the spoons
Well for me,
I want my subscribers to be healthy
I am thankful that they show me so much love
I want to bring them better content for mukbang
Thanks everyone~
That's hard
[Thank you] Subtitles by Hyun Choi antharoni@gmail.com
